description: Black handbag crafted from synthetic leather with two short handles woven through metallic loops One external zipped pocket in the front Strap, buckle and rivet details on the front Two external zipped pockets on the sides Press buttons on the sides and a loop and buckle on the sides to connect the two sides in the middle for a compact look One main slot with press buttoned closure with two inner slots, an inner zipped pocket in between, a zipped pocket and an organiser sleeve on the sides One external zipped pocket at the back
